title: Sustainable Coffee Farm
shortDescription: Help us transition to shade-grown coffee to protect local biodiversity.
description: We are a family-owned farm in Colombia looking to transition our 5-hectare plot to shade-grown coffee. This will help preserve the local bird population and improve soil health. We need funding for seedlings and native trees.

stages.name: Nursery Setup
stages.description: Building the nursery and acquiring seedlings.

stages.name: Planting
stages.description: Planting the shade trees and coffee bushes.

title: Organic Wheat Expansion
shortDescription: Expanding our organic wheat production to meet growing local demand.
description: Our organic wheat has been a hit at the local markets. We want to lease an additional 10 acres to increase production. Funding will go towards land lease and organic seeds.

title: Urban Vertical Garden
shortDescription: Bringing fresh greens to the city center with hydroponics.
description: We are setting up a vertical hydroponic garden in a repurposed warehouse. We aim to supply local restaurants with fresh, pesticide-free greens year-round.
